The v1.5.0 emit logic in build_final_db.py lines 2469-2552 (form_status, form_match_status, dose_status, is_safety_concern, display_role_label, severity_status) IS present but was not exercised when these blobs were built. The audit's check is conservative; manual review needed for the Phytosome/Ferrochel-on-non-iron cases.

phase_1_raw_to_final.counter_definition_note: The blob's raw_actives_count is computed by the cleaner from display_ingredients[] and includes expanded nested-blend children. The audit's raw_actives walker counts activeIngredients[] entries (plus nestedRows). They differ by definition — the blob.raw_actives_count is the canonical reconciliation baseline. Audit log keeps both for transparency.
